name: Convex Bribe Harvester (Votium)
description: Claim vlCVX vote bribes from Votium each 2-week epoch. Bribers pay $0.05-0.20 per vlCVX vote — for a $50k vlCVX position, that's $1000-4000 every 2 weeks. Auto-claim is critical because manual claiming is forgettable.
use_case: Agent locked 100k CVX → 100k vlCVX. Each epoch (14 days) Votium distributes bribes. Auto-claim collects ~$2500 every 2 weeks = ~$65k/yr in passive income.

steps.expression: proofs.map(p => ({ token: p.token, index: p.index, amount: p.amount, merkleProof: p.proof }))

verification.criteria: Tx called Votium.claimMulti with account == agent. Post-tx ERC-20 balances for at least one bribe token increased.
